skill.name: note-cleanup
skill.description: Clean messy meeting notes into structured markdown summaries with clear decisions, action items, owners, and open questions.
skill.summary: Turn rough meeting notes into clean markdown recaps.
skill.author: yaojingang

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged two weak cryptography patterns, but both cited lines are plain descriptive text about cleaning notes. No evidence found of cryptographic code, command execution, network access, filesystem access, secret handling, or prompt injection.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Match in Interface Copy
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged this line as weak cryptography, but it is a plain short description for meeting note cleanup. It contains no cryptographic algorithm, executable code, or security-sensitive behavior. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited line is ordinary interface metadata. No cryptographic API, algorithm name, or executable logic appears in context.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Match in Skill Description
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged this line as weak cryptography, but it describes organizing meeting notes into markdown summaries. It does not include cryptographic logic, unsafe algorithms, or code that can run. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited line is natural-language front matter. It contains no security-sensitive implementation details or weak cryptographic operation.

content.value_statement: Messy meeting notes make follow-up slow and unclear. This skill turns rough notes into summaries, decisions, action items, and open questions.
actual_capabilities: Reads rough meeting notes before restructuring them.
Removes duplicate points and obvious noise.
Creates sections for summary, decisions, action items, and open questions.
Preserves important names, dates, and owners.
Formats the final recap as structured markdown.
limitations: It depends on the detail and accuracy of the supplied notes.
It does not verify facts against calendars, recordings, or external systems.
It cannot infer missing owners or deadlines with certainty.
It is designed for text notes, not audio transcription.

use_cases.title: Prepare Team Recaps
use_cases.description: Turn informal meeting notes into a concise recap for team follow-up.

use_cases.title: Track Product Decisions
use_cases.description: Separate decisions from open questions after roadmap or planning discussions.

use_cases.title: Create Client Follow-Ups
use_cases.description: Convert client call notes into clear action items and unresolved questions.

prompt_templates.title: Clean Basic Notes
prompt_templates.prompt: Use note-cleanup to organize these meeting notes into summary, decisions, action items, and open questions.

prompt_templates.title: Extract Owners
prompt_templates.scenario: Clean notes that include names and commitments.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use note-cleanup to clean these notes. Preserve names, dates, owners, and any explicit deadlines.

prompt_templates.title: Prepare Executive Recap
prompt_templates.scenario: Create a concise recap for stakeholders.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use note-cleanup to produce a short executive summary, decisions, action items with owners, and unresolved questions.

prompt_templates.title: Audit Follow-Up Gaps
prompt_templates.prompt: Use note-cleanup to organize these notes and mark action items that are missing an owner, date, or clear next step.

output_examples.input: Rough notes from a sprint planning meeting with repeated ideas and unclear next steps.
output_examples.output: A clean recap with a brief summary, confirmed sprint decisions, assigned action items, and open questions.

output_examples.input: Client call notes with names, dates, questions, and several duplicate comments.
output_examples.output: A structured follow-up note that removes duplicates and keeps owners, dates, decisions, and unresolved client questions.

output_examples.input: Brainstorming notes from a product review session.
output_examples.output: A readable markdown summary that separates agreed decisions from ideas that still need validation.

best_practices: Include the full raw notes so context is not lost.
Keep original names, dates, and owner labels when available.
Review action items before sending the recap to others.
anti_patterns: Do not use it to invent decisions that were not in the notes.
Do not ask it to verify facts without providing source material.
Do not use it as a replacement for legal or compliance review.

faq.question: What kind of notes does this skill clean?
faq.answer: It works best with rough meeting notes, planning notes, client call notes, and internal discussion notes.

faq.question: Does it preserve owners and dates?
faq.answer: Yes. The workflow explicitly preserves important names, dates, and owners when they appear in the notes.

faq.question: Can it create action items?
faq.answer: It can extract action items from the notes and organize them clearly. It should not invent missing commitments.

faq.question: Does it remove duplicate content?
faq.answer: Yes. The workflow removes duplicates and obvious noise before producing the structured recap.

faq.question: Can it process audio recordings?
faq.answer: No. This skill is designed for text notes. Audio must be transcribed before use.

faq.question: Which tools support this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
